demographics.living_situation: lives at home with a live-in family caregiver who is currently out; a visiting distant relative found her today and is present

contact_nok.relationship: visiting distant relative (present, making the call)

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I've come to visit my elderly aunt and found her in a terrible state — shut in her bedroom, filthy, shaking and frightened, with a horrible smelly weeping sore on her leg. She's telling me the relative who lives with her and is meant to look after her takes all her pension, keeps her locked in this room, and hurts her when she complains. He's out at the moment but could be back any time and she's petrified of what he'll do.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The relative found her today locked away and unwell and wants urgent help to get her safe and get the leg looked at before the live-in carer comes home.

symptom_narrative.onset: the relative found her like this today; the leg sore has been getting worse and smellier over recent weeks with nothing done about it
symptom_narrative.duration: weeks of the untreated leg sore; the fear and being kept locked in the room has been going on for a long time
symptom_narrative.character: an open, weeping, foul-smelling sore on the lower leg; she is unwashed, in soiled clothes, visibly trembling and tearful
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: she says she feels awful and is terrified; the relative says she looks very unwell and neglected
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the sore is on the lower leg; she also points to bruises on both her arms
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worse over recent weeks and frightened all the time
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: she says it gets worse when the live-in carer is around
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: she feels warm and run down; the relative thinks she may have a temperature; she has not been eating or drinking properly
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: she normally needs a walking frame but has been kept in the room without it and can barely move about

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: high blood pressure, usually on tablets for it
past_medical_history.how_managed: blood-pressure tablets, but she says she hasn't been given them for about a week

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a long-standing sore/ulcer on the lower leg
past_medical_history.how_managed: was supposed to be on antibiotics for it but says she hasn't had them for at least a week

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: frail and needs a walking frame to get around

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: antibiotic tablets for the leg (name not known)

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives with a live-in family caregiver who she says controls her pension and money; the landline has been disconnected and she has been kept isolated and locked in a bedroom; a visiting distant relative found her today and is the one seeking help.

communication_style.typical_message_style: frightened, tearful, glancing at the door; the visiting relative relays much of the account

access_barriers.financial: says the live-in carer takes her pension and leaves bills unpaid
access_barriers.other: landline disconnected, kept isolated, no personal phone, restricted mobility without her frame

objective_data_offered.value: an older woman who is unwashed, in soiled clothing, visibly shaking and tearful, but alert and talking clearly
the visiting relative reports a foul-smelling, weeping open sore on her lower leg with surrounding redness
the visiting relative reports bruises on both of her upper arms that she cannot explain
the visiting relative says she feels hot to touch and seems feverish, and has not been eating or drinking
a padlock fitted to the outside of her bedroom door; the room is bare with no telephone or way to call for help
